name: Tahnee
bio_short: Creating containers for new social relationships and collective care through clay, dance, printmaking, fiber arts, and facilitation.
bio_full:
My practice centers on creating containers for new social relationships and collective care. Through facilitation, clay, dance, printmaking, and fiber arts, I work with communities to build intergenerational connection and mutual support.

I am deeply committed to place-based work and long-term relationship with the communities I call home. My current investigations focus on what it means to be a non-parent actively participating in community child-rearing — and the absence of scripts for that role.
